Cleanest 65 outing — double progression met → bump 70 next Tue; Sat slot unaffected (Adj #150)

Front half cleaner than Tue (RIR 2/2 vs 1/0), same 12/12/9/8 shape — hold-until-clean (set 3 RIR 1+ at 12) not met. Hold 25 both slots; elbow clean 3rd straight session (Adj #159)
135 landed — set 1 RIR 3 = the prescribed RPE 7 target. Hold (Adj #153)

Headroom RESTORED — ran exactly to the cap (sets 1-3 RIR 1+, last set only to failure at 13). Adj #135 condition met → bump 355 next Sat on a clean lift-day AM Achilles read (Adj #160). Achilles clean through the 7-13 maximal TT (Adj #164)
